name: Eternal Dynasty
background:
The Eternal Dynasty are a faction of advanced aliens from the Kusari sector. Their forces consist of well armed infantry and drones, supported by high tech robots and vehicles.

Originally, they emerged from a world long divided into a patchwork society of warring clans. The royal house became adept at manipulating clans, leading potential rivals into a series of destructive wars before imposing their laws over survivors and forming a ruling Dynasty. The Eternal Dynasty will go to any length to maintain this fragile unity as they expand out into the stars.
backgroundFull:
The Eternal Dynasty come from the Kusari Sector, where they lived peacefully for millennia, and their home system became known as “stars of calm”, due to the enduring peace that the faction enjoyed. However, as the population continued to grow and spread through their system, a number of different philosophies began to flourish and diverge with each other. In order to maintain peace, a ruling system was established where regions were divided into clans under the nominal control of a Royal Dynasty. The Royal Dynasty was intended to serve as a mediator, and the title was intended to circulate amongst the ruling families of the various clans.

The dynastic system preserved peace for a time, but gradually the authority of the ruling dynasty began to wane as the clans continued to push for their own individual interests. Eventually, the Royal Dynasty were no longer able to mediate conflicts between clans, and conflict erupted. Over time, the Dynasty became a mere puppet of the most powerful clan, while rivalry between clans gave way to open hatred and xenophobia.

The Clan War era continued for over a century, as the clans struggled to maintain their rule over the system, until they were replaced by the next clan. Eventually, the title of Royal Dynasty fell to a family who held no specific clan allegiance. This family ceased intervening in conflicts but instead used their position to fuel conflict between the clans. 

This resulted in a series of violent and extremely bloody conflicts, which devastated the Stars of Calms and greatly weakened the clans. Then, the Royal Dynasty intervened and united the remaining clans under an expanded royal army. The Dynasty refused to pass on their power as tradition required, instead declaring themselves the Eternal Dynasty.  

The Eternal Dynasty’s rule has led to an age of peace and prosperity, which has allowed them to expand into the stars and beyond the Kusari sector. Yet, bitterness remains between the clans even after centuries of peace. Much of their society still bears the scars of the clan wars, and many follow the rule of the Dynasty only reluctantly, due to their role in the final conflicts that ended the Clan War Era.

How will you bring your unity to the stars?

specialRules.name: Fortified
specialRules.description: When units where all models have this rule take hits, those hits count as having AP(-1), to a min. of AP(0).

specialRules.name: Stealth Aura
specialRules.description: This model and up to 3 nearest friendly units picked before the start of the game get Stealth. If this model is killed, picked models that are deployed lose the rule.

specialRules.name: Teleport
specialRules.description: Once per activation, before attacking, place this model anywhere fully within 6" of its position.

specialRules.name: Unpredictable Fighter
specialRules.description: When in melee, roll one die and apply one effect to all models with this rule: on a 1-3 they get AP(+1), and on a 4-6 they get +1 to hit rolls instead.

specialRules.name: Unique
specialRules.description: This unit may only be taken once per army.

specialRules.name: Repel Ambushers
specialRules.description: Enemy units using Ambush must be set up over 12" away from this model's unit.

specialRules.name: Shielded
specialRules.description: Units where all models have this rule get +1 to defense rolls.

specialRules.name: Shred
specialRules.description: On unmodified results of 1 to block hits, this weapon deals 1 extra wound.

specialRules.name: Precision Fighter Aura
specialRules.description: This model and up to 3 nearest friendly units picked before the start of the game get +1 to hit rolls in melee. If this model is killed, picked models that are deployed lose the rule.

specialRules.name: Piercing Hunter Aura
specialRules.description: This model and up to 3 nearest friendly units picked before the start of the game get Piercing Hunter. If this model is killed, picked models that are deployed lose the rule.

specialRules.name: Clan Warrior
specialRules.description: For each unmodified roll of 6 to hit when attacking, this model may roll +1 attack with that weapon. This rule doesn’t apply to newly generated attacks.

specialRules.name: Versatile Attack
specialRules.description: When this unit is activated, pick one effect: until the end of the activation all models with this rule in it either get AP(+1) when attacking, or get +1 to hit rolls when attacking.

specialRules.name: Rapid Charge Aura
specialRules.description: This model and up to 3 nearest friendly units picked before the start of the game moves +4" when using Charge actions. If this model is killed, picked models that are deployed lose the rule.

specialRules.name: Counter-Attack Aura
specialRules.description: This model and up to 3 nearest friendly units picked before the start of the game get Counter-Attack. If this model is killed, picked models that are deployed lose the rule.

specialRules.name: Rapid Advance Aura
specialRules.description: This model and up to 3 nearest friendly units picked before the start of the game get Rapid Advance. If this model is killed, picked models that are deployed lose the rule.

specialRules.name: Ignores Cover Aura
specialRules.description: This model and up to 3 nearest friendly units picked before the start of the game get Ignores Cover when shooting. If this model is killed, picked models that are deployed lose the rule.

specialRules.name: Fearless Aura
specialRules.description: This model and up to 3 nearest friendly units picked before the start of the game get Fearless. If this model is killed, picked models that are deployed lose the rule.

specialRules.name: Melee Evasion Aura
specialRules.description: This model and up to 3 nearest friendly units picked before the start of the game get Melee Evasion. If this model is killed, picked models that are deployed lose the rule.

specialRules.name: Bounding
specialRules.description: When this unit is activated, you may place all models with this rule in it anywhere fully within D3+1" of their position.

specialRules.name: Surge
specialRules.description: On unmodified results of 6 to hit, this weapon deals 1 extra hits (only the original hit counts as a 6 for special rules).

specialRules.name: Puncture
specialRules.description: Ignores Regeneration, and against non-Hero units with Tough(3) or more, this weapon gets AP(+4).

specialRules.name: Vengeance
specialRules.description: When this unit is fully destroyed, place as many Vengeance markers on the unit that destroyed it as models with this rule in this unit at the beginning of the game. Friendly units get +X to hit rolls with their weapons when attacking that unit, where X is the number of markers on it.

specialRules.name: Clan Warrior Boost Aura
specialRules.description: This model and up to 3 nearest friendly units picked before the start of the game get Clan Warrior Boost. If this model is killed, picked models that are deployed lose the rule.

specialRules.name: Increased Shooting Range Mark
specialRules.description: Once per activation, before attacking, pick up to 4 enemy units within 18", which friendly units get +6" range when shooting against once (next time the effect would apply).

specialRules.name: Ambush Beacon
specialRules.description: Friendly units using Ambush may ignore distance restrictions from enemies if they are deployed within 6" of this model.

specialRules.name: Casting Buff
specialRules.description: Once per activation, before attacking, pick one friendly model within 12" with Caster, which gets +1 to casting rolls once (next time the effect would apply).

specialRules.name: AP
specialRules.description: Targets get -X to Defense rolls when blocking hits.

specialRules.name: Stealth
specialRules.description: When units where all models have this rule are shot from over 9" away, enemy units get -1 to hit rolls.

specialRules.name: Ambush
specialRules.description: Only deploys D3 rounds afters its wave is deployed, and at the start of the round it's placed at the centre of a random table quarter.

specialRules.name: Piercing Hunter
specialRules.description: This model gets AP(+1) when shooting enemies over 9" away.

specialRules.name: Counter-Attack
specialRules.description: Strikes first when charged.

specialRules.name: Counter
specialRules.description: Strikes first with this weapon when charged, and the charging unit gets -1 total Impact rolls per model with Counter.

specialRules.name: Rapid Advance
specialRules.description: This model moves +4" when using Advance actions.

specialRules.name: Ignores Cover
specialRules.description: This weapon ignores cover.

specialRules.name: Fearless
specialRules.description: When a unit where all models have this rule fails a morale test, roll one die. On a 4+ it counts as passed instead.

specialRules.name: Fear
specialRules.description: This model counts as having dealt +X wounds when checking wound effects in melee (must deal at least one wound).

specialRules.name: Melee Evasion
specialRules.description: Enemies get -1 to hit rolls in melee when attacking units where all models have this rule.

specialRules.name: Regeneration
specialRules.description: When a unit where all models have this rule takes wounds, roll one die for each. On a 5+ it is ignored.

specialRules.name: Ignores Regeneration
specialRules.description: This weapon ignores Regeneration.

specialRules.name: Tough
specialRules.description: Once a model has taken as many wounds as its Tough value, it is killed (remove from play).

specialRules.name: Clan Warrior Boost
specialRules.description: Models with Clan Warrior in this unit get extra attacks on successful hit results of 5-6 from Clan Warrior (instead of only on 6).

specialRules.name: Caster
specialRules.description: Follows same rules as heroes, picking one random spell to cast, and spending all tokens to cast it when activated. If the chosen spell can’t be cast for any reason, then the model doesn’t cast.

specialRules.name: Flying
specialRules.description: May move through units and terrain, and ignores terrain effects whilst moving, and automatically passes jumping rolls.
